data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

resultRaw.sql: SELECT d.id AS department_id, d.name AS department_name, COUNT(p.id) AS professor_count FROM public.departments AS d LEFT JOIN public.professors AS p ON p.department_id = d.id GROUP BY d.id, d.name ORDER BY professor_count DESC, d.name ASC;

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

result.sql: SELECT d.id AS department_id, d.name AS department_name, COUNT(p.id) AS professor_count FROM public.departments AS d LEFT JOIN public.professors AS p ON p.department_id = d.id GROUP BY d.id, d.name ORDER BY professor_count DESC, d.name ASC;
